Viewed Tomorrow is your IIT JEE Advanced examination.

This is not an examination of luck.
This is not an examination of who studied one extra chapter yesterday night.
This is not even an examination where the paper level matters the most.

This is the examination of years of hard work.
Of discipline when nobody was watching.
Of waking up again after bad mock tests.
Of solving questions when your mind wanted to quit.

Tomorrow, one thing will matter the most — your psychological strength.

Your temperament.
Your calmness.
Your ability to move forward.

If one question goes wrong — forget it fast.
If one section feels tough — forget it fast.
If others come out discussing answers — stay away.

Do not carry one mistake into the next problem.
Every new question is a new opportunity.

Between Paper 1 and Paper 2:
Don’t discuss solutions.
Don’t compare attempts.
Don’t calculate marks.
Protect your mind like a warrior protects energy before the final battle.

Tomorrow is about composure.
About patience.
About giving your absolute best shot, one problem at a time.

Just sit.
Read carefully.
Think clearly.
Solve bravely.

And remember — the paper is not designed to defeat you.
It is designed to test who stays stable under pressure.

Thousands will panic.
Stay calm.
Thousands will overthink.
Trust your preparation.

You have already done the hard part.

Now go and fight with courage.

All the best to every JEE Advanced aspirant.
Give your best shot. 🔥

Viewed Meloni Welcomes PM Modi With Special Night Tour Of The Colosseum.

Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni gave Prime Minister Narendra Modi a warm welcome in Rome with a stunning night-time visit to the iconic Colosseum. Meloni shared photos from the historic landmark and wrote, “Welcome to Rome, my friend!” on social media.

Modi’s Italy visit marks the final leg of his five-nation tour and focuses on boosting India-Italy ties, trade, defence cooperation, and the India-Middle East-Europe Economic Corridor (IMEC). The two leaders are also expected to review the Joint Strategic Action Plan 2025–2029.

Viewed Operation Sentry was unprecedented - putting prototypes of the new A41 Centurion into the hands of troops actually fighting in North West Europe in 1945. 

The Second World War ended before the tanks could arrive, but six Centurions were sent over 81 years ago today - on 19th May 1945 - and spent two months undergoing trials, evaluations and assessments by front line troops. 

Centurion brought together all the lessons about tank design that the British had learned during WWII. It became one of the most successful tanks ever built – with a well-balanced combination of protection, firepower and mobility – and could be extensively upgraded. It was sold to 19 other nations, and its service life has continued into the 21st century. 

The vehicle shown was one of those first Centurions - T352414, Prototype number 6 – it is the oldest surviving Centurion tank in existence – and can be seen in our WW2: War Stories exhibition, here at The Tank Museum.

Viewed India-Israel Defence Partnership Gets a Major Boost With New Radar Plant in Tamil Nadu.

Bengaluru-based DCX Systems and Israel Aerospace Industries’ ELTA Systems have begun construction of a new radar manufacturing facility in Tamil Nadu under their joint venture ELTX Systems.

Coming up in the Shoolagiri Industrial Area, the plant will manufacture, integrate, and test advanced airborne and ground-based radar systems for Indian defence programmes.

Expected to be operational by April 2027, the project supports India’s “Make in India” and “Atmanirbhar Bharat” goals through local manufacturing, technology transfer, and expansion of indigenous defence capabilities.

Viewed India wants to be a Vishwaguru. 

But who are we actually competing with?

China pulled 80 million people out of poverty in 50 years. America is watching its hospitals and schools collapse under greed. And India? We are still benchmarking ourselves against Pakistan.

Devdutt Pattanaik said something that stopped me cold in this conversation. We are sitting right between two superpowers and we haven't figured out which direction we want to go.

Are we chasing the American dream that is already falling apart? Or do we have an ancient wisdom of our own that the whole world actually needs right now?

The irony is that we have the philosophy. We have the stories. We have thousands of years of knowledge about greed, power, wealth and society. And yet we are not using ANY of it.

This conversation will make you question everything about where India is headed and what we are truly capable of. 🇮🇳

Viewed Me and Martin Garrix made Repeat it 12 years ago after we made friends on a night out in Amsterdam. At the time I was in the middle of Multiply rollout, and the song just never ended up coming out for whatever reason. Me and him have remained mates for all that time, and we’ve spoken about it often about when would be a good time to put it out. He turned 30 this weekend, and is putting out his debut album this year, so seemed like a better time than any to finally do it. We got to play it live for the first time in Santiago last night, and it was one of my favorite moments of my career. Reminds me to just trust in the fun of music sometimes and stop overthinking it. Also, not for nothing, but I’d say every day fans leave comments under my posts asking where it is, so this one is for you guys. Happy Birthday Martin, and to the fans, enjoy the video, its clips from both our lives over the last 12 years and what we’ve been up to since we finished it in a studio in the mid west of America on tour in 2014. It’s gonna be fun playing this all summer. Music video out now. Loads of love everyone x

A single NEET UG 2024 examination center (Code 392311) in Sikar, Rajasthan, Shri Mangal Chand Didwaniya Vidya Mandir has posted results that are raising eyebrows across the country:

- 4 students scored 700+
- 45 students scored 650+
- 92 students scored 600+
- 200+ students scored 500+

Sikar is undoubtedly a coaching powerhouse, and disciplined preparation can produce outstanding results. However, when such an extraordinary concentration of top percentiles emerges from one center, it naturally invites questions about uniformity, invigilation standards, and the integrity of the examination process.

This isn’t about doubting every hardworking student or every reputed coaching institute. It’s about demanding transparency and accountability from the National Testing Agency (NTA). In a country where millions of students stake their futures on these exams, even the perception of irregularity can erode trust in the entire system.

We’ve seen similar debates in previous years as well. The pattern needs serious scrutiny, not just for this center, but to strengthen the credibility of NEET and other national-level examinations going forward.

What are your thoughts?

- Is this simply the result of world-class coaching?
- Or does it point to systemic loopholes that need immediate plugging?

Open to constructive perspectives from educators, policymakers, coaching professionals, and students.

#NEET2024 #Education #ExamIntegrity #NTA #IndianEducation #Transparency

Viewed A joyous moment for every Indian! 

Chola Copper Plates dating back to the 11th Century will be repatriated to India from the Netherlands. Took part in the ceremony for the same in the presence of Prime Minister Rob Jetten. 

The Chola Copper Plates are a set of 21 large plates and 3 small plates and largely contain texts in Tamil, one of the most beautiful languages of the world. They relate to the great Rajendra Chola I formalising an oral commitment made by his father, King Rajaraja I. They also showcase the greatness of the Cholas. We in India are immensely proud of the Cholas, their culture and their maritime prowess. 

I thank the Government of the Netherlands and Leiden University in particular, where the Copper Plates were kept since the mid-19th century.

Viewed Zohran Mamdani Says NYC’s $12 Billion Budget Deficit Is Now Zero.

New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani has announced a balanced $124.7 billion budget after previously warning that the city faced a historic $12 billion deficit. His administration says the gap was closed through savings measures, new revenue plans, and support from New York State.

Mamdani said the city avoided major service cuts and property tax hikes while restoring fiscal stability. The budget also includes investments in housing, childcare, public transport, and community services, marking one of the biggest financial policy moves of his mayoral term so far.

Viewed অবশেষে WBCS ২০২৪ প্রিলিমিনারি পরীক্ষার দিন ঘোষণা করা হলো, ১৪ জুন ২০২৬

দীর্ঘদিন ধরে বাংলার লক্ষ লক্ষ চাকরিপ্রার্থী যুবক যুবতীকে ভুগতে হয়েছে অনিশ্চয়তা, বিলম্ব এবং প্রশাসনিক ব্যর্থতার কারণে। পরীক্ষার তারিখ পিছিয়েছে, নিয়োগ প্রক্রিয়া থমকে থেকেছে, আর বহু মেধাবী ছাত্রছাত্রীর স্বপ্ন আটকে গিয়েছিল দুর্নীতি ও অপদার্থ প্রশাসনের জালে। আজ পশ্চিমবঙ্গে ফিরছে জবাবদিহিতা এবং প্রশাসনিক শৃঙ্খলা। বিজেপি সরকারের উদ্যোগে বহুদিনের অচলাবস্থা কাটিয়ে অবশেষে এগোতে শুরু করেছে গুরুত্বপূর্ণ নিয়োগ প্রক্রিয়া।

পশ্চিমবঙ্গের যুব সমাজ আর প্রতারণা নয়, তারা চায় স্বচ্ছ নিয়োগ, সময়মতো পরীক্ষা এবং তাদের পরিশ্রমের সঠিক মর্যাদা।এটাই নতুন পশ্চিমবঙ্গের শুরু - যেখানে মেধাই হবে একমাত্র পরিচয়, আর সুশাসনই হবে উন্নয়নের ভিত্তি।

Viewed Is this a Coaching Success Story or a Red Flag?

A single NEET UG 2024 examination center (Code 392311) in Sikar, Rajasthan, Shri Mangal Chand Didwaniya Vidya Mandir has posted results that are raising eyebrows across the country:

- 4 students scored 700+
- 45 students scored 650+
- 92 students scored 600+
- 200+ students scored 500+

Sikar is undoubtedly a coaching powerhouse, and disciplined preparation can produce outstanding results. However, when such an extraordinary concentration of top percentiles emerges from one center, it naturally invites questions about uniformity, invigilation standards, and the integrity of the examination process.

This isn’t about doubting every hardworking student or every reputed coaching institute. It’s about demanding transparency and accountability from the National Testing Agency (NTA). In a country where millions of students stake their futures on these exams, even the perception of irregularity can erode trust in the entire system.

We’ve seen similar debates in previous years as well. The pattern needs serious scrutiny, not just for this center, but to strengthen the credibility of NEET and other national-level examinations going forward.

What are your thoughts?

- Is this simply the result of world-class coaching?
- Or does it point to systemic loopholes that need immediate plugging?

Open to constructive perspectives from educators, policymakers, coaching professionals, and students.

#NEET2024 #Education #ExamIntegrity #NTA #IndianEducation #Transparency

Viewed 1,600 drones and missiles. 30 hours of relentless bombardment. 🚨

For more than a day and a half straight, Russia has subjected Ukraine to an unimaginable, continuous aerial assault. The sirens haven't stopped, and millions of Ukrainians have spent another sleepless night under fire. Russia attacked critical and civilian infrastructure, killing at least 15 people and injuring more than 100 across Ukraine. In Kyiv and the region, Russian attacks killed three people and injured 40.

Ukrainian Air Defense forces are working beyond the limits of human endurance to intercept these massive swarms and protect our cities, but the sheer volume of the attacks is overwhelming.

Right now, reinforcing Ukraine's air defense is not just a priority – it’s a matter of daily survival. Every intercepted target means lives saved and homes preserved.

If you can help, please join our ongoing Sky Defense mission. You can support the massive joint fundraiser recently launched by top German content creators, who have united their communities to help Ukraine shield the skies.

👉 Stand with them and protect Ukrainian lives here: https://u24.gov.ua/news/sky-defense-german-content-creators?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=sd-german-creators&utm_content=main-community

The sky is Ukraine’s shield, but it needs your support. Thank you for not looking away! 🇺🇦🛡️

Viewed Dharmendra Pradhan keeps talking about transparency, world class universities, AI powered monitoring, and education reforms. But under his tenure, India’s education system has suffered one credibility collapse after another.

NEET paper leaks. UGC-NET cancellation. Recruitment scams. Students protesting on the streets. Exams getting cancelled overnight after lakhs of students spend years preparing for them. And despite all this, the Education Ministry still behaves as if everything is under control.

In today’s video, I break down the failure of India’s education system under Dharmendra Pradhan. From repeated exam leaks and NTA controversies to broken universities, coaching mafia, bizarre policy decisions, and a generation slowly losing trust in merit itself.

Because when students stop believing that hard work matters, the damage is not limited to one exam. It destroys faith in the entire system.

Video goes live at 03:30 PM today. This is not just an education crisis. It is a national crisis.

           ଯେତେ ଯେତେ ମହାପାପ ଯଥା କ୍ଷତ୍ରୀୟମାନେ ଯୁଦ୍ଧକ୍ଷେତ୍ରରୁ ପୃଷ୍ଠଭଙ୍ଗ ଦେବା, ମାତା, ପିତା ତଥା ଗୁରୁଜନଙ୍କ ନିନ୍ଦା କରିବା, ବ୍ରହ୍ମହତ୍ୟା କରିବା, ଗୋହତ୍ୟା କରିବା, ପରସ୍ତ୍ରୀକୁ ହରଣ କରିବା, ମିଥ୍ୟା କହିବା ମିଥ୍ୟା ବେଦ ପଢ଼ିବା, ମିଥ୍ୟା ଶାସ୍ତ୍ର ଲେଖିବା ଏବଂ ମିଥ୍ୟା ବିଦ୍ୟା ଇତ୍ୟାଦି ଅଭ୍ୟାସ କରିବା ଜନିତ ଯେତେ ଅପରାଧ ଓ ପାପ ଯେଉଁଥିରେ ନର୍କଦଶା ହେବା କଥା, ଏହି ଏକାଦଶୀ ପାଳନରେ ତାହା ନାଶ ହୋଇ ବ୍ରତୀକୁ ବୈକୁଣ୍ଠାସନ ମିଳେ । ପୁନଶ୍ଚ କୁହାଯାଇଛି ଯେ ଏହି ଏକାଦଶୀ ପାଳନ କରିବା ଫଳରେ ତିନି ପୁଷ୍କର ସ୍ନାନ, କାର୍ତ୍ତିକ ସ୍ନାନ ଏବଂ ଗଙ୍ଗା ସ୍ନାନ ଇତ୍ୟାଦିର ପୁଣ୍ୟଫଳ ମିଳିଥାଏ । ସିଂହରାଶିର ଲୋକେ ଗୁରୁବାର ଦିନ ଗୋମତୀରେ ସ୍ନାନ କରିବା, କୁମ୍ଭରାଶିର ଲୋକେ କେଦାରନାଥଙ୍କୁ ଦର୍ଶନ କରିବା ଏବଂ ବଦ୍ରିକା ଆଶ୍ରମରେ ବାସ କରିବା ଫଳରେ ଯେଉଁଫଳ ମିଳେ ଅଥବା ଚନ୍ଦ୍ରଗ୍ରହଣ ଓ ସୂର୍ଯ୍ୟପରାଗ ସମୟରେ କୁରୁକ୍ଷେତ୍ରରେ ସ୍ନାନକଲେ ଯେଉଁ ପୁଣ୍ୟଫଳ ମିଳେ, ତାହା କେବଳ ଏହି ଏକାଦଶୀ ବ୍ରତ ପାଳନ ଫଳରେ ମିଳିଥାଏ । ଏକଥା ମଧ୍ୟ କୁହାଯାଇଛି ଯେ ହାତୀ, ଘୋଡ଼ା ତଥା ଯଜ୍ଞରେ ସ୍ୱର୍ଣ୍ଣଦାନ କଲେ ଯେଉଁ ଫଳ ମିଳେ, ତାହାମଧ୍ୟ ଏହି ଏକାଦଶୀ ପାଳନରେ ମିଳିଥାଏ । ଏହି ଏକାଦଶୀ ପାଳନ ଫଳରେ ଭୂମି, ସ୍ୱର୍ଣ୍ଣ, ଗୋ ବା କନ୍ୟାଦାନ ପୁଣ୍ୟର ଆବଶ୍ୟକତା ନଥାଏ । ପାପରୂପୀ ବୃକ୍ଷ ଛେଦନ ପାଇଁ ଏହା ଏକ କୁରାଢ଼ି ସ୍ୱରୂପ ଅଥବା ସିଂହକୁ ଦେଖି ମୃଗ ପଳାଇବା ପରି, ଏହି ଏକାଦଶୀ ଯିଏ ପାଳନ କରେ ତାକୁ ପାପ ସ୍ପର୍ଶ କରେନାହିଁ ଅର୍ଥାତ୍‌ ତାଠାରୁ ଦୂରେଇ ଯାଏ l

ଯେ ପୁରେ ପ୍ରାପତେ ଲଙ୍ଘଣୀ l ଜନ୍ମ ମରଣ ମାତ୍ର ଜାଣି ll 
ଅପରା ଉପୋଷଣ କରି l ତ୍ରିବିକ୍ରମକୁ ପୂଜା କରି ll

ଏହାକୁ ପଢିଲେ ଶୁଣିଲେ l ଧେନୁ ସହସ୍ର ଫଳ ମିଳେ ll

Viewed I thought my attention span was broken.
It wasn’t.

I was trying to learn in formats my brain was never built for.

Long PDFs. Endless notes. Walls of text.
I’d consume everything… and retain almost nothing.

Then I switched to visual, structured, interactive learning and suddenly things clicked.

Because most people don’t have a focus problem...They have an information design problem.

Visuals stick.
Stories stick.
Structure sticks.

That’s the shift I can’t stop thinking about lately.

Viewed One of the first signs that Michael was committed to authenticity comes in its recreation of the Jackson family’s childhood home in Gary. The film accurately depicts the cramped reality of the house where the family lived—a modest two-bedroom, single-storey home on Jackson Street.

To reflect just how little space the family had, the filmmakers even recreated the boys’ sleeping arrangements: six brothers sharing one bedroom in two three-tiered bunk beds. Meanwhile, Katherine and Joseph occupied the second bedroom, while Janet, La Toya, and Rebbie slept on a pull-out sofa in the living room. 

It’s a small but important detail that grounds the story in the harsh reality of the Jacksons’ humble beginnings—and the environment that shaped one of music’s most extraordinary families.

Viewed মনে করুন এটা একটা ভূতের গল্প বলছি, তাই গল্পের ছলেই পড়ুন..

গেল মাসে ডাওহিল গিয়েছিলাম।
তবে এবারে ডাওহিল অভিযানের প্ল্যানটা ছিল একেবারে অন্যরকম। 'এবার' শব্দটা এজন্য উচ্চারণ করলাম তার কারণ ডাওহিল থেকে নতুন করে আমাদের পাওয়ার মতন আর কিছু নেই। গত চার বছরে এখানে আমি তিন তিনবার অভিযান চালানোর পর ডিক্লেয়ার করেই দিয়েছিলাম উত্তরবঙ্গের এই জঙ্গল সম্পূর্ণ ক্লিন। সুতরাং আমরা ভেবেছিলাম এবারে ডাওহিল মিশনটা হবে একটু অন্যরকম এবং তাৎপর্যপূর্ণ। (ভিডিওর প্রথম পর্ব অলরেডি চ্যানেলে এসে গেছে, চ্যানেল সরাসরি গিয়ে ভিডিও দেখতে পারো,)

দেখুন আমরা তো ভূতে বিশ্বাস করিনা, কিন্তু অনেকে তো করে। আর আমরা যেখানেই যাই সেখানে গিয়ে আমরা এটাই প্রমাণ করে আসি যে 'এখানে কিছু নেই'। কিন্তু বাকি যারা বছরের পর বছর ধরে অত্যাধুনিক সব বৈজ্ঞানিক যন্ত্রপাতি দিয়ে আত্মা বা এনার্জির অস্তিত্বকে প্রমাণ করে এসেছেন তারা এ বিষয়ে আমাদের এই বক্তব্যকে অস্বীকার করেন। কিন্তু শুধু অস্বীকার করলে তো হবে না, আমরা চাই প্রমাণ, তাও অন ক্যামেরা।

কাজেই এবারের মিশনে আমাদের পাশাপাশি আমি এমন একজন প্যারানরমাল এক্সপার্টকে রেখেছিলাম যিনি মানেন যে এনার্জি বলে সত্যিই কিছু হয়, এবং সেটা প্রমাণও করেছেন বহুবার। তিনি আজকের নয় 2003-2004 থেকে রিসার্চ করে চলেছেন এবং এই কাজের সাথে নিযুক্ত। তিনি তন্ময় দাস যার সাথে এর আগেও আমি একটা ডিবেট পডকাস্টে বসেছিলাম। তিনি সেখানে আমাকে চ্যালেঞ্জ করেছিলেন যে আত্মা বা এনার্জি বলে সত্যিই কিছু আছে। সেদিন তাকে আমি একটাই কথা বলেছিলাম যে যদি কখনো সম্ভব হয় আমরা একই সাথে একই জায়গায় ইনভেস্টিগেশন করব। তারপর কেটে গেছে বহু সময়, কিন্তু কখনো ভাবতে পারিনি যে সত্যিই আমাদের একসাথে অভিযান চালানোর একটা সুযোগ এসে যাবে। এক কথায় বলতে গেলে এটা একটা ডিবেট অভিযান, যেখানে একজন প্রমাণ করবে 'ভূত আছে কি নেই' আরেকজন অর্থাৎ আমরা দীর্ঘদিন যা করে এসেছি এবারেও সেই কাজে অনর থাকবো। এই অভিযান TLB-র সম্মান রক্ষার লড়াই, অস্তিত্ব টিকিয়ে রাখা লড়াই, বিশ্বাসকে আরো দৃঢ় করা লড়াই। ঠিক একইভাবে তন্ময়দা-ও তার ক্যারিয়ার, তার চ্যানেল, তার প্রতি সম্মান, তার অস্তিত্ব এবং তার ফ্যানেদের তার প্রতি বিশ্বাসকে অটুট রাখার আপ্রাণ লড়াই চালাবে।
এছাড়াও তন্ময়দার টিমে রয়েছেন আরও পাঁচজন টিম মেম্বার, অনিন্দম ঘোষাল যিনি একজন সফটওয়্যার ইঞ্জিনিয়ার এবং গ্যাজেট ডেভলপার, এখানেই শেষ নয়, তোমাদের সাথে থাকছেন অঘোরী তান্ত্রিক অবদূত সুরজিতানন্দ ভৈরব এবং তার দুই শিষ্য, থাকছেন স্নেহা বৈদ্য যিনি একজন psychic reader। আর অন্যদিকে TLB তে আমি আর রানা।

কাজে এখানে দুটো পক্ষ এক হল যারা মানেন আস্তিক, এবং যারা মানেন না অর্থাৎ নাস্তিক। এবং যেটা সত্য তার কথাই হবে শেষ কথা। জায়গা হিসেবে আমরা পশ্চিমবঙ্গের দুটি বড় হন্টেড লোকেশনকে টার্গেট করি, এক হল কার্শিয়াং এর ডাউহিল ফরেস্ট অন্যটি কালিম্পং এর মর্গ্যান হাউসের 104 নম্বর রুম। দেখুন হার জিতটা এখানে বড় কথা নয়, আমরা হেরে গেলে আমরা কাল থেকে মেনে নেব যে "ভূত আছে।" দেখুন সত্যিটা মানতে তো ক্ষতি নেই, কিন্তু স্বচক্ষে দেখব তবেই মানবো। আমরা হার-জিতের থেকেও সত্যে বিশ্বাসী, কাজেই আমরা চাই সত্যের জয় হোক। তাই আপনাদের কাছে অনুরোধ করছি এই অভিযান দুটো একটু মন দিয়ে দেখবেন, এবং আমি অনুরোধ করব যে যারই ফ্যান হোক না কেন বিপক্ষ টিমকে কোনরকম কটুক্তি করবেন না। ভিডিওর প্রথম পর্ব অলরেডি চ্যানেলে এসে গেছে, চ্যানেল সরাসরি গিয়ে ভিডিও দেখতে পারো..

Viewed Spain 🇪🇸 Now One of Europe’s Largest Training Grounds for Ukrainian Soldiers

Spain has now trained more than 9,000 Ukrainian service members under the European Union Military Assistance Mission in support of Ukraine, marking a new milestone in one of Europe’s largest long-running military training efforts, according to the Spanish Defence Staff on May 12.

The EU-led training mission, known as EUMAM Ukraine, was launched in late 2022 to strengthen the combat capabilities of Ukraine’s armed forces amid the Russian war against Ukraine.

During the first months of 2026 alone, Spanish military units operating under the Toledo Training Coordination Centre expanded instruction programs for Ukrainian troops across a wide range of specialties.

The latest training cycles included advanced military topography, military police operations, armored recovery vehicle courses, and a second round of Leopard 2A4 combat vehicle maintenance and operational training.

According to Spanish defense officials, Spain trained around 8,000 Ukrainian troops during 2025 through more than 185 training modules and 30 specialties. That program has now expanded to over 230 modules covering 40 specialties.

Training is being conducted not only by the Spanish Armed Forces but also with support from the Guardia Civil, which previously participated in international training operations in countries including Iraq, Mali, and Somalia.

রাস্তার মোড়ে মোড়ে অবৈধ টোল গেট বসিয়ে বছরের পর বছর সাধারণ মানুষ, ট্রাক চালক আর ব্যবসায়ীদের থেকে জোর করে টাকা তোলা হয়েছে। এবার অবৈধ টোল সিন্ডিকেটের বিরুদ্ধে শুরু হয়েছে সরাসরি অভিযান। সমস্ত অবৈধ টোল গেট, ড্রপ গেট ও এক্সটরশন চেকপোস্ট চিহ্নিত করে ভেঙে ফেলার নির্দেশ দিয়েছে পশ্চিমবঙ্গ সরকার।

Viewed Putin’s Ceasefire Ended at Midnight—Russian Drones Hit Ukraine Within Hours

Russia followed the expiration of its own three-day ceasefire with a fresh wave of overnight drone attacks across Ukraine, striking residential areas and civilian infrastructure in Kyiv, Dnipro, Kharkiv, and several other regions.

Only hours after the end of the three-day “ceasefire” declared by Russian leader Vladimir Putin, Russian forces launched a new wave of drone attacks across multiple regions of Ukraine, striking residential areas, infrastructure, and civilian facilities, according to the President of Ukraine, Volodymyr Zelenskyy, on May 12.

Air raid alerts spread across much of the country as Russian drones targeted Kyiv and surrounding regions, as well as Dnipropetrovsk, Kharkiv, Chernihiv, Zhytomyr, Zaporizhzhia, Vinnytsia, and Kherson regions.

In the Kyiv region, a Russian drone struck a kindergarten, while in the capital, debris from a downed UAV hit a 16-story residential building, sparking a fire and injuring civilians.

According to Ukrainian officials, the attacks began almost immediately after the Kremlin’s declared ceasefire expired.

President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said Russia had launched more than 200 attack drones overnight, alongside over 80 guided aerial bombs and more than 30 separate air strikes along the frontline.

“Russia itself chose to end the partial silence that had lasted for several days,” Zelenskyy said.

“Overnight, more than 200 attack drones were launched against Ukraine. Aerial bombs were used again on the front – more than 80 of them, and over 30 air strikes were recorded.”

Viewed You know what the rule is at LinkedIn before hiring someone new?

They have to be better than at least 75% of the existing team.

That's how they keep raising the bar. Every hire makes the next hire harder.

In our recent episode, Vishwa Mohan, Founder and CEO of upGrad School of Tech, explained how hiring works at companies like LinkedIn, Amazon, and PayPal. 

Seven rounds of interviews. Each round testing something different.

The first two rounds at LinkedIn were pure hands-on coding. Can you build? 

Then came hypothetical situations: how would you design this, how would you solve that? 

After that, they go deep into your past work. A real use case you solved. 

The final round is the manager round. And by then, the direction to the team is already set: whoever comes in next has to raise the average.

This is why the same degree, the same college, the same resume can get wildly different outcomes. 

The filter isn't credentials anymore. It's whether you make the team better.

Full episode out now, watch it here: https://www.figuringout.co/link/fo-508

Viewed NTA just declared that NEET 2026 will be reconducted. Jo NEET Aspirants isme appear honge, mera unke liye ek message hai — your pain and frustration is understandable, but usse sachhai nahi badlegi. In fact, ye frustration tumhara RE-NEET barbaad hi karega.

So jiska NEET achha nahi gaya tha, think of it as another opportunity. Jinka achha gaya tha, think of May 3 as yet another mock test. Sunne me kadwa lagega, but aur option kya hai?

Abhi RE-NEET ki date nahi aayi hai but 4-5 weeks me hoga. Till then, apni mental state wapas student waali lao, mocks solve karo, questions practice karo aur sahi mindset se paper do. 

Crying and complaining is not a solution; getting into right headspace is. Aur jo jitna jaldi ye baat samjhega, utna hi achha uska NEET jayega.

Agar NEET ke baare me koi bhi guidance chahiye mujhse, to batana. All the best.

Viewed Most people misunderstand the Aghor path.

They see fear. Darkness. Death.

But after this conversation with Swami Avdhoot Alakhram ji, I realised that Aghor is actually about dissolving fear dissolving ego and moving closer to truth.

We spoke about Bhairav, Ma Kali, Shunya, the astral body, suffering, Tantra, and why spiritual growth begins when your attachment to identity starts fading.

One thing that stayed with me from this episode:
“Real Shava Sadhana is killing the ego while being alive.”

This wasn’t just a podcast.
It felt like entering a completely different dimension of Sanatan Dharma.

Would genuinely love to know:
What’s one spiritual concept that has deeply changed your perspective on life?

Viewed 🚨 NEET SCAM EXPOSED AGAIN – INDIA’S EDUCATION SYSTEM IS A JOKE! 🚨
Another year, another NEET paper leak. 2026 edition cancelled after “guess papers” magically matched 100-140 questions. Students burnt months of their lives, families took loans, sacrificed everything, only for the mafia to sell the paper like cheap street food.
This isn’t the first time.
2015: Full leak, Supreme Court cancelled.
2016: Arrests in UP.
2021: Papers on social media.
2024: Bihar-Jharkhand gangster operation, CBI caught 155+ beneficiaries.
2026: Same story, different date.

How many times will NTA and the government say “isolated incident”? How many CBI probes before we admit the entire system is rotten? Crores spent on “security,” yet leaks keep happening like clockwork.

Students are dying by suicide, living in anxiety hell, while paper leak gangs, coaching cartels, and corrupt officials laugh all the way to the bank. This is not just exam malpractice, this is national betrayal of an entire generation.
Enough is enough.Suspend tainted officials. Arrest the masterminds. Fix the damn system or scrap NEET. Our children’s futures are not lottery tickets for criminals.

And why NEET is still offline?

Viewed 1 in 5 mothers will experience a mental health condition after childbirth. 

In India, nearly 1 in 5 suffers from postpartum depression. Yet only 20% are ever screened for it.

Even though all this is not talked about enough, there's another layer we almost miss every time: the identity shift.

Kiara Advani talked about this in our recent episode. After becoming a mother, she said everything changes that now she is a completely different person in every way. 

Motherhood is a psychological reorganisation of self. And the grief of who you were, the confusion of who you're becoming, is rarely named, measured, or even acknowledged.

According to Kiara, she spent most of her life being other-centric. Showing up for everyone else, taking care of the people around her. 

Then she became a mother. And for the first time, she started building a relationship with herself.

More responsibility led to more self-awareness. When you're giving everything to someone else, you finally see how little you were giving to yourself.

When asked about raising her daughter, she mentioned she doesn't want her to experience life through someone else's experience. 

She wants her to make her own choices, her own mistakes, and form her own understanding. Protection can become a limitation.

Full episode out now, watch it here: https://www.figuringout.co/link/fo-507

Viewed If you're preparing for any EXAM, here's something for you! ❤️

(sorry it's long - will take 2 mins to read)

Just remember that whatever you are doing right now is very important, but at the same time, it probably won’t matter that much 10 years from now. Life goes on. People who do great in exams will still have to work hard in life, and people who don’t do great might have to work even harder. But in the end, the work still needs to be put in by everyone.

So take a chill pill. Treat this like just another exam. Don’t overstress yourself. I just read an article where someone gave up on their life because they were scared they wouldn’t do well in an exam. That’s genuinely so sad bro.

You never really know how an exam will go. What if, in some imaginary world, the questions only come from the chapters you studied? You won’t believe how often stuff like that actually happens. Sometimes the exams I gave my absolute best for didn’t go that well. And sometimes the exams where I felt underprepared went surprisingly great.

So don’t take unnecessary pressure. Go to the battlefield. Give it your best. But once it’s over, come back, relax. You prepared for the battle, and now the battle is over.

Now it’s time to win the war, the war of life.⚡

This exam is just one battle in life, not the entire war.

What really matters is whether you gave your best from this point on. You’ll do great.

Kill it. All the best. ❤️

Boost your daily productivity with these powerful Outlook tricks that save time and keep your workflow organized. From scheduling emails to using Quick Steps and Focused Inbox - these simple features can make a huge difference in your work routine.

Pro Tip:
Use keyboard shortcuts like:

title:
Viewed Every version of me that the world sees today was first believed in by one person - my mother.

As a kid, I used to think my mom was invincible.

Like no matter what happened, she would somehow fix it.
Bad day? Mom.
Fear? Mom.
Failure? Mom.
Confusion? Mom.

No matter how difficult life felt, her presence somehow made things feel lighter.

But growing up makes you realise something you never understood as a child:
while we were growing up, our mothers were growing up too.

The older I get, the more I understand that motherhood is probably one of the purest forms of love.
A love where someone keeps choosing you every single day, even when life gets difficult for them personally.

People often talk about success, ambition, money, achievements.
But behind most people who are doing well in life, there’s usually a mother who prayed harder than anyone else, sacrificed more than anyone else, and loved without conditions.

As kids, we think our parents are strong because they have answers.
As adults, we realise they were strong even while figuring life out themselves.

A lot of who we become is shaped by the love, patience, and resilience we receive at home.

And honestly, no matter how much life changes, a part of me will always remain that little kid who looks for comfort in his mother’s presence.

Today is just a reminder to say the things we often forget to say.

Thank you mom.
For believing in me before I believed in myself.

Happy Mother’s Day to the women who hold families together even when nobody notices the weight they carry.

And if you’re reading this - what’s one thing your mother did for you that you’ll never forget?
Would love to read your stories today ❤️

The incident appears linked to celebrations organised by the Irish-Pakistani community in Cork. Ireland’s official flag guidelines state that no flag should be flown above the national flag and that the Irish tricolour should be displayed in the correct orientation.

Viewed Ukraine’s 🇺🇦 Volunteer Team Downed 213 Russian Drones Using An-28 With Machine Guns and Interceptors

Ukraine’s modified An-28 aircraft used to intercept Russian Shahed-type attack drones has reportedly destroyed 213 aerial targets since the start of operations.

According to The New York Times on May 6, the tally was visible through kill markings painted on the fuselage of the aircraft, which had been converted from a civilian transport plane into a low-cost airborne drone interception platform.

The aircraft is operated by a volunteer crew working alongside Ukraine’s air defense network. The report described how the An-28 is scrambled during nighttime Russian drone attacks and directed toward incoming targets by dispatchers before visually locating drones in the air.

The aircraft is equipped with an American-made M134 Minigun capable of firing thousands of rounds per minute. According to the report, only short bursts are typically needed to destroy a Shahed drone.

The New York Times noted that each interception costs roughly $500 in ammunition, significantly less than the price of surface-to-air missile launches, which can cost hundreds of thousands or even millions of dollars.

The fuselage markings shown in the report included symbols representing Shahed drones and Russian Gerbera decoy drones. Additional markings appeared to indicate kills achieved using airborne interceptor drones launched directly from the aircraft.

Indian-born politician Q Manivannan has been elected to the Scottish Parliament as a member of the Scottish Greens, drawing attention online after reports highlighted that they are neither a British citizen nor a permanent UK resident. Manivannan, who moved to Scotland in 2021, was elected through the Edinburgh and Lothians regional list.

Viewed Ukraine’s 🇺🇦 Drone Teams Join NATO Drill Defending Sweden’s 🇸🇪 Baltic “Aircraft Carrier”

Ukraine has taken part in Sweden’s large-scale Aurora 26 military exercises focused on the defense of Gotland Island and the Baltic Sea region, as Stockholm continues to deepen military cooperation with NATO partners and Kyiv.

According to Swedish Armed Forces and Sweden’s Ministry of Defense, the exercises involve more than 16,000 Swedish troops alongside forces from 11 allied nations and Ukraine. Aurora 26 began on April 27 and is scheduled to continue through May 13.

The drills include land, naval, and air operations across Sweden and the Baltic Sea, with a particular focus on reinforcing and defending Gotland, the strategically located island viewed as central to NATO’s defense posture in the region.

Swedish military officials stated that Ukrainian participation takes place within the framework of partnership cooperation and joint training with Western countries. Ukraine joined the exercises through the expanded JEF-Ukraine partnership tied to the UK-led Joint Expeditionary Force (JEF).

According to the Swedish Armed Forces, rapid deployment of allied forces from mainland Sweden to Gotland is one of the key operational scenarios of Aurora 26. NATO countries participating in the exercise deployed air defense assets, logistics hubs, infantry units, and Ukrainian drone teams to the island.

“For an important part of our collective defense is ensuring that units arrive in the right place, at the right time, and with the right capabilities,” exercise commander Rear Admiral Jonas Wikström said in a statement published by the Swedish Armed Forces.

title: Viewed पश्चिम बंगाल के सबसे पहले मुख्यमंत्री-

Viewed I wanted to make a post about the way Chester - and really, the band's music altogether - has always been about introspection, about looking deep within, dealing with stuff, healing, finding closure, inner strength, and togetherness with others. Yet there are people in this fandom- and it's not singular to us but this is the LP community page so it's going to be about LP fans - who swear they're LP fans yet a lot of times, they act so radically different than what Chester used to teach us about loving each other and love being stronger than everything else. They act so unlike the way the band has been all along - emotionally intelligent. Fan accounts with pretty big followings on social media throwing hate at other artists, or making political posts wishing ill on an entire country or worse , disrespectful towards an entire continent 😂 Fans who criticize the band's management for not doing "enough" to promote them. Fans throwing dirt at the band for a couple of posters they didn't like and claimed it was AI - it was not. The artist in question specified exactly what it was in the IG post under the poster pic, indeed it was digitally made but that doesn't make it AI or less valid. Fans who act like haters and still being bitter about Emily joining LP. And the list is endless.
Now I know we're not all robots and we have free will and just because we listen to a artist doesn't mean we have to be a carbon copy of them. 
But there's some things, you just don't do. And not because of the artist - it's common sense and humanity. 
And it's really, really nice when I can just be offline and focus on things that*I* love, it's when I come back online to see all the nonsense...
If you're going to spend time posting online negatively about other artists, if you're going to be negative towards a country or another...if you're going to throw your so said favorite band under the bus for not doing what YOU want them to do. Please, do not call yourself a fan. 
So I wanted to make a post about art and humanity. I've never been one to hate anyone. And I won't be that. Because I was raised better than that. 
So here's a couple of LP logo drawings, as simple and uncomplicated they may be. I love Linkin Park and music and art and the things that unite us, not divide us. So if someone's going to be about division, just know, maybe you need to listen a little closer to what the artist you claim to love has to say. 
Have a peaceful weekend Soldiers, stay true & take care 🫶

P.S I know that making a post about things won't change anything, but at least it's something off my chest and maybe someone out there relates and it's two people who feel the same way.

Viewed 🇩🇪 Rheinmetall to Supply Ukraine With 100,000 Long-Range Artillery Shells Annually

German defense contractor Rheinmetall has agreed to produce 100,000 long-range artillery shells per year for Ukraine.

These munitions have a strike range of up to 60 kilometers, significantly enhancing the capability of Ukrainian forces to reach targets deep behind the front lines, according to Militarnyi on May 7.

The announcement followed a conference call regarding the company's first-quarter results for 2026. According to the German Aid to Ukraine resource, Rheinmetall CEO Armin Papperger confirmed that the company is responding to a broader request from Ukraine for 1.2 million extended-range shells annually.

These 155mm munitions are designed for use with NATO-standard artillery systems already in service with the Ukrainian military, such as the PzH 2000, Caesar, and Archer.

The production boost comes as part of a larger effort by Rheinmetall to meet the growing demand for ammunition from both Ukraine and NATO member states following Russia’s full-scale invasion of Ukraine.

In February 2026, German Defense Minister Boris Pistorius stated that Germany would support Ukraine’s request by providing the necessary funding for these high-performance shells. This type of ammunition is critical for modern maneuver warfare, allowing for the destruction of logistics hubs and command centers at a safe distance.

Viewed Ukraine’s 🇺🇦 “Trident” Anti-Drone Laser Is Now Mobile, AI-Assisted, and Nearing Deployment

Ukraine’s advanced “Trident” laser system has been integrated into a mobile anti-drone platform designed to counter everything from FPV attack drones to reconnaissance UAVs, the system’s developer Celebra Tech told Militarnyi on May 7.

According to Militarnyi, the laser complex is now undergoing final testing ahead of a public presentation, marking one of the most ambitious Ukrainian directed-energy projects revealed since the start of the full-scale Russian invasion.

The existence of the Trident system was first publicly mentioned in late 2024 by Vadym Sukharevskyi, but developers say the project has since evolved from an early concept into a fully approved combat-ready prototype.

Celebra Tech told Militarnyi that the system can currently destroy reconnaissance drones at ranges of up to 1,500 meters, while the effective engagement range against FPV drones is around 800 to 900 meters.

The company also stated the laser is now “practically capable” of hitting Shahed strike drones at distances of up to 5 kilometers.

According to Militarnyi, the system received several major upgrades during development, including AI-assisted targeting, automatic target acquisition and tracking, and integration with radar systems capable of calculating precise flight trajectories for incoming aerial threats.

The laser weapon is mounted on a trailer-based mobile platform, allowing operators to rapidly deploy it to threatened areas, including military positions, infrastructure facilities, and industrial sites.

Viewed Nepal's new government is being treated like a revolution on Instagram. The PM is a rapper, the Home Minister is a DJ, this is the GenZ government that ran its operations on Discord. But behind this viral PR campaign is a very different picture, and from an Indian perspective, that picture is deeply uncomfortable.

Balen Shah hung a Greater Nepal map in his office during his mayoral tenure, one that showed parts of UP, Bihar, Uttarakhand and Sikkim inside Nepal's borders. He tweeted "Fuck India," deleted it, but the screenshot survived. Now as PM, his government is talking about blocking the Kailash Mansarovar Yatra, enforcing customs duty on anything above 63 rupees at the border, and deploying Armed Police Force with loudspeakers to collect tax on packets of chips. This is not a new government finding its footing. This is an ideology that has finally found power.

In today's video I breakdown Nepal's new government and expose everyone who has been celebrating this administration online while deliberately hiding its anti-India agenda.

What happens in the neighbourhood reaches your doorstep. Nepal is landlocked. Fuel, trade, cooking gas, everything moves through India. When this tension escalates, ordinary people on both sides of the border pay the price.

Video goes live at 05:00 PM today. Watch before you form an opinion.

Viewed 🌸 ২৫ বৈশাখ — রবীন্দ্র জন্মজয়ন্তী 🌸
প্রিয় শিক্ষার্থীরা,
আজ ২৫ বৈশাখ — এক অসাধারণ দিন।
আজকের এই দিনে জন্ম নিয়েছিলেন এমন একজন মানুষ, যিনি শিখিয়েছিলেন — জ্ঞান মানে শুধু বই মুখস্থ করা নয়, জ্ঞান মানে নিজেকে আলোকিত করা।
রবীন্দ্রনাথ ঠাকুর বলেছিলেন —
"আমাদের জীবনের প্রতিটি মুহূর্তই শিক্ষার সুযোগ।"
তোমরা যারা আজ পড়াশোনার চাপে ক্লান্ত, পরীক্ষার ভয়ে উদ্বিগ্ন, ভবিষ্যৎ নিয়ে অনিশ্চিত —
একটু থামো।
মনে রেখো —
🌿 প্রতিটি ভুল তোমাকে একটু বেশি শেখায়
🌿 প্রতিটি কঠিন দিন তোমাকে একটু বেশি শক্তিশালী করে
🌿 প্রতিটি স্বপ্ন পূরণ হওয়ার যোগ্য — যদি তুমি হাল না ছাড়ো
রবীন্দ্রনাথ বলেননি জীবন সহজ হবে। তিনি বলেছিলেন জীবন সুন্দর — এবং সেই সৌন্দর্য খুঁজে নিতে হয় নিজেকেই।
তোমার কলম, তোমার মেধা, তোমার পরিশ্রম — এটাই তোমার সবচেয়ে বড় শক্তি।
আজকের দিনে একটাই প্রতিজ্ঞা করো —
শুধু সফল হওয়ার জন্য নয়, একজন আলোকিত মানুষ হওয়ার জন্য পড়ো।
🌸 শুভ ২৫ বৈশাখ। শুভ রবীন্দ্র জন্মজয়ন্তী।
✨ তোমাদের জন্য ভালোবাসা ও শুভকামনা রইল।

Viewed “They Answer Calls Even at 1 AM” Burj Khalifa Developer Explains Why He Prefers Hiring Indians.

Mohamed Alabbar, founder of Emaar Properties and the developer behind the Burj Khalifa, said he prefers hiring Indians because of their work ethic, discipline, and commitment. Speaking at the “Make it in the Emirates” summit in Abu Dhabi, Alabbar said, “There’s a saying, hard work beats talent when talent fails to work hard, and this is why I like to hire Indians, because they answer the phone even at one o’clock in the morning.

Alabbar also reflected on lessons from the 2008 financial crisis and the Covid-19 pandemic, stressing the importance of resilience, adaptability, and constant execution in business. He said companies survive repeated crises only when teams remain disciplined, responsive, and prepared for uncertainty.

Viewed Jail Love Story in MP: Assistant Jail Superintendent Marries Former Murder Convict.

A unique love story from Madhya Pradesh’s Satna Central Jail has gone viral after Assistant Jail Superintendent Firoza Khatoon married former inmate Dharmendra Singh, who had served a life sentence in a murder case. The two reportedly met during his time in prison, where Singh assisted jail authorities with warrant-related work, and their interactions gradually turned into a relationship.

The interfaith marriage reportedly faced opposition from Khatoon’s family, who did not attend the ceremony. In their absence, members of Bajrang Dal and VHP participated in the wedding rituals, with a local VHP leader performing the ‘kanyadaan’. The wedding has since sparked widespread discussion online for its unusual circumstances and social backdrop.

Buried near the boundary between the mantle and the core, these structures are hotter, denser, and older than the surrounding material. Viewed Ola Electric Accelerates Production at India’s First EV Gigafactory.

Ola Electric has announced a faster production ramp-up at its Gigafactory in Tamil Nadu, positioning it as India’s first large-scale EV battery manufacturing facility by an Indian company. The company says the move is aimed at strengthening indigenous battery production and reducing dependence on imported cells as India pushes deeper into electric mobility.

The Gigafactory currently operates at around 2.5 GWh capacity and is being scaled up further as Ola expands its in-house “Bharat Cell” ecosystem. The company claims its growing battery manufacturing capabilities are already helping improve economies of scale, reduce EV costs, and support the broader domestic EV supply chain.

Viewed আত্মশক্তি!
তোমার পূজার ছলে তোমায় ভুলেই থাকি -তাই রবীন্দ্রপুজোর আমি ঘোর বিরোধী। 

বছরে দু-দিন ফুল-মালা চড়িয়ে, ধূপ-বাতি ঘুরিয়ে, গানে-গানে আকাশ-বাতাস মাতিয়ে -কী হবে যদি না তাঁর কথাগুলো আমরা গ্রহণ করতে পারি!

রবীন্দ্রনাথ দেবতা নন, তিনি মানুষ। দোষে-গুণে মানুষ। কিন্তু যে জন্য বুড়োকে মহাকাল এখনও ভয়ানকরকম বাঁচিয়ে রেখেছেন, যদি আমরা আজ সেই মহাজীবন থেকে কিছু গ্রহণ করি। রবীন্দ্রনাথকে গ্রহণ করা সহজ নয়; সাধ্য তো বটে!

যেদিন বাঙালির জাতীয়তাবাদীচেতনা জেগে উঠেছিল, জাতির কানে কানে তিনি দিয়েছিলেন এক বীজমন্ত্র ‘আত্মশক্তি’। মন হবে ভয়শূন্য। আনুগত্যে-আত্মবিশ্বাসের অভাবে মাথা নুয়ে পড়বে না। জ্ঞানের অধিকার অবাধে,শ্রেণিনির্বিশেষে প্রত্যেককে সক্ষম করে তুলবে। নিজেদের ক্ষুদ্র সীমানা, ছোটো ছোটো স্বার্থের পাঁচিলের বাধা সরিয়ে আমরা বিশ্বনাগরিক হয়ে উঠতে পারবো। তুচ্ছ আচার, সংকীর্ণ বিচার আমাদের ব্যক্তিত্বকে পেড়ে ফেলবে না। -এরকম একটা দিন যদি আসে, পরিবেশ যদি পাওয়া যায়, সেদিনই এই গান গাওয়া যাবে -এই আকাশে আমার মুক্তি আলোয় আলোয়। সেটাই বাঙালির আত্মশক্তিতে বলীয়ান হয়ে ওঠা।

এই কাজটা করবেন কারা? যাঁরা বুঝি আমাদের আজ কী প্রয়োজন, কী দিয়ে মিটবে আমাদের খিদে; সেই রসদ জোগাতে হবে তাঁদেরই, যাঁরা নেতা। নেতামাত্রই রাজনৈতিক ব্যক্তিত্ব নন। রবীন্দ্রনাথ বলতেন,“ক্ষুধা হলেই মানুষ অন্নের স্বপ্ন দেখে। আজকাল আমাদের দেশে পোলিটিক্যাল আত্মপরিচয়ের ক্ষুধাটাই নানা কারণে সবচেয়ে প্রবল হয়ে উঠেছে।" -সে খিদে শুধু নিজের পেট ভরানোর খিদে। সেই খাওয়ার নমুনা আমরা দেখেছি, অন্যতর কিছু দেখার অপেক্ষায় রইলাম… বাঙালির আত্মশক্তি!

Viewed What is the strongest tangible proof of coding competence in real-world scenarios?


Open Source it is. Which is strongly engraved into the culture of Polaris.


This year, 18 Polaris students became part of that culture through Google Summer of Code 2026.


And they’re not just contributing locally. They’re now working across open-source ecosystems spanning 9 countries, contributing to real-world systems in:


- cybersecurity
- healthcare & genomics
- developer infrastructure
- ⁠geospatial systems
- ⁠programming languages


Working alongside experienced mentors, building systems used by developers and organizations across the world.


But behind every selection is a completely different story...


While some students started with utmost clarity, some rebuilt from scratch after setbacks. Some learned by breaking things, fixing them, and trying again.


What connects all of them is simple:


- They showed up consistently.
- They kept building.
- And they contributed before they felt “ready.” 


That’s what open source teaches better than anything else.


And that’s the culture we’re trying to build at Polaris School of Technology.


Huge congratulations to all the students!

Viewed Society was built to make money. 

Indifferent to your health and sanity. 

For example, we did not evolve to: 
+ sit 10 hours a day
+ have our attention fractured 300 times daily 
+ compare ourselves to millions of others 
+ travel 9 time zones in 13 hours 
+ tolerate sounds above 85 dB causing hearing loss 
+ outsmart algorithms hijacking our reward system
+ breathe fine particulate air pollution
+ live under 16+ hrs of artificial light a day
+ have 3 courses of antibiotics before age 2
+ eat ultra-processed foods for 60% of daily calories
+ consume 17 teaspoons of added sugar a day

So if you're feeling down in the dumps, maybe fatigued, a little or a lot depressed, anxious, that's why.

Viewed A country has built strategic control over more nations in 20 years than most would think possible. All without any military intervention.

China controls 90% of the world's rare earth processing. You can't build a phone, a car, or a missile without them. 

It has strategic ports in Sri Lanka, Pakistan, and across Africa. Thousands of Chinese-made surveillance cameras operate in Australia and the United States. 

And none of this required a single soldier crossing a border.

In our recent episode, Samir Saran, President of the Observer Research Foundation and curator of the Raisina Dialogue, explained China's global power strategy.

It begins with infrastructure. China funds projects that look impressive but are designed to fail economically. 

An airport in a country that doesn't have the traffic to sustain it, a port that will never see enough ships. 

The economics don't work, and that's the point. 

When the country can't repay, China doesn't demand the money back. It asks for land, contracts, terminals, and control. 

Sri Lanka's Hambantota Port, now under a 99-year Chinese lease, is the clearest example.

Then there's rare earth. These minerals go into everything: smartphones, EV batteries, missile systems, fighter jets. 

China controls the entire processing chain. When you control the inputs for modern technology, you control the negotiating table.

Samir argued that India cannot become a $10 trillion economy without building its own leverage. 

The competition between India and China over the next two decades will be fought through supply chains, port access, mineral processing, and data infrastructure.

Full episode out now, watch here: https://www.figuringout.co/link/fo-506

Viewed “Infiltration, Cow Smuggling Will Be Impossible Under BJP Rule”: Amit Shah

Union Home Minister Amit Shah said infiltration and cow smuggling would become “impossible” in West Bengal under a BJP government. Viewed Ukraine 🇺🇦 Is Training AI to Hunt Russian Targets—And Offering the Tech to Britain🇬🇧

Ukraine is rapidly expanding the use of artificial intelligence on the battlefield, using AI-assisted drones to identify and strike Russian targets with growing precision, according to BFBS Forces News on May 6.

Forces News reported that Ukrainian drones now use machine vision and machine-learning algorithms during the “terminal phase” of an attack — the final several hundred meters before impact.

The systems can independently track targets, place a digital lock on vehicles or personnel, and continue the strike even under heavy Russian electronic warfare.

The technology is proving especially valuable against jamming, one of Moscow’s main battlefield advantages. According to data cited by Forces News, AI-assisted targeting can make even inexperienced drone operators up to four times more effective.

Ukraine’s advantage in the AI race is increasingly tied to the enormous amount of combat footage generated during the war.

Drone warfare analyst David Hambling told Forces News that Ukraine collected the equivalent of roughly 228 years of drone video footage during 2024 alone. That data is now being used to train AI systems to recognize Russian vehicles, troop movements, artillery positions, and battlefield behavior patterns under real combat conditions.

Viewed Nepal has always had amazing people. Warm, respectful, deeply connected to India in ways politics can never fully explain. Millions of Indians love Nepal, millions of Nepalis love India. Our borders stayed open because our relationship was never just diplomatic. It was civilizational.

The frustrating part has always been the politics. One government after another keeps discovering new ways to play anti-India politics for short-term gains, even when common people on both sides clearly want friendship, stability, and cooperation.

India and Nepal are too culturally connected to become enemies. Politicians will come and go. But the bond between ordinary Indians and Nepalis has survived every government, every controversy, and every attempt to divide it.

Viewed I was having a conversation with someone a few days ago where they kept using the term “AI agent” everywhere, even where it didn’t belong in a technical discussion.

It’s not a must to use AI agents while building an AI system. In fact, you shouldn’t use agents when they’re not required. Avoiding agents/LLMs can save cost, reduce inference time, and improve predictability and explainability.

While working on AI projects for our clients, we see this again and again—on many occasions, rule-based approaches or traditional lightweight models work far better than using LLMs or multi-turn agents.

I’ve created some content on AI agent basics that clearly explains what agents are, the difference between workflows and agents, frameworks, code, etc.

Link in the comments 👇

Viewed Today marks the first anniversary of Operation Sindoor, a defining moment in India’s national security history. Launched on May 7, 2025, this operation sent a clear and loud message: India will no longer tolerate cross-border terrorism. The operation was triggered by the tragic Pahalgam terror attack in early 2025, which claimed the lives of 26 innocent tourists. In a massive, multi-force coordinated effort, India responded with precision and power.

Key Highlights of the Operation:
Precision Strikes: Targeted terror launchpads and military infrastructure across the border in Pakistan and PoK. Multi-Force Synergy: A seamless combination of Air Power, advanced Drones, and Precision Missiles. Strategic Message: PM Narendra Modi emphasized that this was a "fitting response," establishing a new era of proactive defense.

A year later, we honor the bravery of the Indian Armed Forces who executed this mission with clinical perfection to ensure the safety of every Indian citizen.

#OperationSindoor #IndianArmedForces #NationalSecurity #IndiaStrikesBack #PahalgamAttack #IndianArmy #IAF #ModiSarkar #AntiTerror #PoK #DefenseNews #Sovereignty #IndianDefense #OneYearAnniversary #StudyIQ #DailyNewsbit

The Project Breakdown
The Route: Mumbai to Ahmedabad (508 km)
The Timeline: Expected completion by 2028
The Speed: 320 km/h (reducing travel time to just 2 hours)

The Cost: ₹1.08 lakh crore (approx. $13 billion), with 81% funded by Japan at a tiny 0.1% interest rate.

Viewed তৃতীয় সেমিস্টারের বই প্রকাশিত হয়েছে। 
ছাত্র-ছাত্রীদের বিপুল উৎসাহ এবং উচ্ছ্বসিত প্রশংসায় আমরা আপ্লুত। আমাদের প্রত্যেকটি বই কলেজ স্ট্রিটে মৌলিক লাইব্রেরীর নিজস্ব বিক্রয় কেন্দ্রে পাওয়া যাবে। ‌ এছাড়াও, তোমার বাড়ির পাশের যেকোনো বইয়ের দোকানে খোঁজ করো, একান্ত বই না পেলে সেখানে অর্ডার করো অর্থাৎ এনে দিতে বলো। ‌ পশ্চিমবঙ্গের প্রতিটি প্রান্তের বইয়ের দোকানে আমাদের বইগুলি পাওয়া যাবে। ‌ এছাড়াও 'রিটেল মহারাজ' এবং আমাজন থেকে অনলাইন মারফত আমাদের বইগুলো সংগ্রহ করতে পারবে। (আপাতত ফ্লিপকার্টে পাবে না) এক্সট্রা ডিসকাউন্ট এবং ফ্রি হোম ডেলিভারি চাইলে ছবিতে থাকা রিটেল মহারাজ হেল্পলাইন নাম্বারে ফোন অথবা  হোয়াটসঅ্যাপ করে নাও। যারা অনলাইন মারফত বই সংগ্রহ করতে চাইছো এই হেল্পলাইনটি শুধুমাত্র তাদের জন্য।

Viewed Nepal has always had amazing people. Warm, respectful, deeply connected to India in ways politics can never fully explain. Millions of Indians love Nepal, millions of Nepalis love India. Our borders stayed open because our relationship was never just diplomatic. It was civilizational.

The frustrating part has always been the politics. One government after another keeps discovering new ways to play anti-India politics for short-term gains, even when common people on both sides clearly want friendship, stability, and cooperation.

India and Nepal are too culturally connected to become enemies. Politicians will come and go. But the bond between ordinary Indians and Nepalis has survived every government, every controversy, and every attempt to divide it.

Viewed I am flying out to Oracle HQ in San Francisco next week to connect with their execs and some of the incredible people in the ecosystem: https://fandf.co/4dosH5v

I’ll be participating in workshops, including topics such as Agent Memory Architectures.

If you want an agent to actually remember what it did an hour ago without starting from scratch, you have to give it a place to store those thoughts. The big engineering debate right now: Filesystems vs. Databases.

A lot of devs (myself included) love the filesystem approach for prototyping. It’s just folders and text files that an LLM can navigate like a human would. But the second you have multiple agents trying to write to the same file at once, or you need to scale, things break. That’s usually the moment you realize you need a database for the search speed and stability. Shoutout to Oracle for sponsoring.

Viewed Ukraine 🇺🇦 Declares Ceasefire From Midnight Overnight May 5–6

Ukraine will unilaterally observe a "regime of silence" starting at 00:00 on the night of May 5 to May 6. This proactive peace initiative underscores Kyiv's commitment to securing a long-term, reliable cessation of hostilities rather than settling for temporary, symbolic pauses.

President Volodymyr Zelenskyy clarified that despite claims on Russian social media, Kyiv has received no official requests regarding ceasefire modalities.

Zelenskyy stated that there has been no official communication addressed to Ukraine concerning the methods of ending hostilities mentioned in Russian social media. He noted that human life is a much greater value than the celebration of any anniversary.

The president reported that the ceasefire will begin at midnight on May 5. He mentioned that it is realistic to ensure that the silence takes effect by that time.

Zelenskyy added that Ukraine will act reciprocally in a mirror fashion starting from that specific moment.

He stated that it is time for Russian leaders to take real steps to end their war, especially if the Russian Ministry of Defense believes it cannot hold a parade in Moscow without the goodwill of Ukraine.

The Russian Ministry of Defense announced a unilateral ceasefire for May 8 and 9, 2026, to mark the anniversary of the victory in World War II. Despite this call for a pause in hostilities, Moscow issued warnings that any disruption to their celebrations would lead to a massive missile strike on the center of Kyiv.

Viewed রাজনৈতিক দল, গণমাধ্যম ও সহনাগরিকদের উদ্দেশে:
শেষ পর্যন্ত পশ্চিমবঙ্গ মৃত্যুবিহীন নির্বাচন দেখতে পারলো না। 

ভালোলেগেছিল এটা দেখে SIR -ইত্যাদি বিতর্কের আবহে ভোট হলেও, সেই ভোট নজিরবিহীনভাবে ছিল মোটেরউপর হিংসামুক্ত। 

আশঙ্কা ছিল। যেভাবে প্রচারের ময়দানে তৎকালীন শাসক ও বিরোধীরা হুমকি, প্রতিহুমকি দিচ্ছিলেন, তাতে আশঙ্কা ছিল। কারণ শাসকের ভূমিকায় থেকে ওই ‘বদলা’র হুমকি, ফল যেদিকেই যাক না কেন, তার প্রভাব পরবর্তীকালে পড়তো।

নির্বাচনের ফল বিজেপির অনুকূলে যাবার পর, বিজেপি নেতৃত্ব সেটাই করেছেন যেটা দায়িত্বশীল রাজনৈতিক দলের কর্তব্য, যাঁরা প্রশাসনে আসতে চলেছেন। সমাজমাধ্যমে সেই বার্তা ছড়িয়েছে। কারণ এখানে সমাজমাধ্যমের একটা বড়ো ভূমিকা আছে।

নিচুতলায় ভাঙচুর, পার্টি-অফিস দখল এগুলোও হয়েছে সমান্তরালে। কিন্তু শীর্ষমহলের বার্তা, পুলিশ-প্রশাসনের কঠোর পদক্ষেপ -এর ফলে সেটা কিছুদিনের মধ্যেই থিতিয়ে যেত।

কিন্তু তা হতে দেওয়া হচ্ছে না। প্ররোচনা চলছে। মারলে পালটা মারও হবে। এটাই প্ররোচনাকারীদের উদ্দেশ্য। কারা এই প্ররোচনা দিচ্ছেন -সেটা চিহ্নিত করে আইনানুগ ব্যবস্থা নেওয়া নবনির্বাচিত সরকারের গুরুদায়িত্ব। পুলিশ-প্রশাসনকে স্বতন্ত্র সামর্থ্য ও মর্যাদায় অবাধে কাজ করতে দেওয়াও। 

লাগাতার কিছু সংবাদমাধ্যম ভোটপ্রচারের উস্কানিমূলক হুমকির ভিডিয়ো প্রচার করেও কি পরোক্ষ প্ররোচনা দিচ্ছেন না?

তৃণমূল সমালোচিত হলে উত্তর দিতেন –‘বাম আমলে কী হয়েছিল?’, এখনও সেই উত্তরই যদি পাই -তবে ধরে নিতে হবে শুধু একটা দলেরই বদল হয়েছে মাত্র। রাজনৈতিক সংস্কৃতি বদলাচ্ছে না। আমার আশা নিজেদের রাজনৈতিক ভবিষ্যতের স্বার্থে বিজেপি সেটা করবেন না। 

প্রত্যেক রাজনৈতিক দলের প্রত্যেক মানুষের রক্তই লাল, কোনো রক্তপাত আমরা চাই না। মানুষ আপনাদের ক্ষমতা দিয়েছে, এসব সমাজবিরোধীদের ঠান্ডা করতে পুলিশ-প্রশাসনের খুব বেশি সময় লাগে না। আইনের শাসন জারি হোক। বিরোধীদের রাজনীতি, নাগরিকদের সমালোচনার পরিসর উন্মুক্ত হোক।

Viewed ‘Dhuno Pora’: The Powerful Bengali Ritual Where Devotees Pray Through Fire and Smoke.

‘Dhuno Pora’ is a traditional Bengali ritual performed during major religious observances like Durga Puja and Shitala Puja across West Bengal. In the ritual, women devotees carry earthen pots filled with burning incense, coconut husk, and embers on their heads and palms while praying for the health, protection, and well-being of their families.

Deeply rooted in faith and endurance, the ritual is associated with devotion to Goddess Shitala, believed to protect against diseases and epidemics. Neem leaves, cooling foods like panta bhat, and the burning dhuno together symbolise purification, healing, and spiritual surrender, making ‘Dhuno Pora’ one of Bengal’s most emotionally powerful traditions.

Viewed US 🇺🇸 Approves $373 Million Precision Munitions Package for Ukraine

The US State Department has officially approved a potential sale of Joint Direct Attack Munition Extended Range (JDAM-ER) kits and related equipment to Ukraine on May 5.

The deal is valued at approximately $373.6 million and aims to enhance the country’s long-range strike capabilities.

Ukraine requested 1,200 tail kits for KMU-572 munitions and 332 tail kits for KMU-556 munitions. The package also includes essential maintenance equipment, spare parts, repair support, specialized software, and technical logistics services to ensure the systems remain operational.

"The proposed sale will improve Ukraine’s capability to meet current and future threats by further equipping it with more capable air defense systems to conduct self-defense and regional security missions," the State Department said in a statement. Boeing has been named as the primary contractor for the order.

The JDAM system is designed to convert standard unguided bombs into precision-guided munitions capable of operating in all weather conditions. It utilizes an integrated inertial navigation system combined with GPS for high accuracy. The extended-range version features a folding wing kit, allowing the bombs to glide toward targets from a distance.

Viewed Ukraine 🇺🇦 Releases Flamingo Missile Launch Footage From 1,500 km Strike on Russian Defense Plant

Ukraine launched long-range cruise missile strikes on multiple Russian military-industrial targets, including a defense facility in Cheboksary, located more than 1,500 kilometers from the Ukrainian border, President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said on May 5.

According to a statement published by President Volodymyr Zelenskyy on May 5, the operation involved combat launches of FP-5 Flamingo cruise missiles as part of a broader “Deep Strike” campaign targeting Russia’s war infrastructure. “

Last night there were combat launches of FP-5 Flamingo cruise missiles as part of the Armed Forces’ Deep Strike operation against several enemy targets, including military-industrial facilities in Cheboksary,” Zelenskyy said.

He added that the missiles successfully covered a distance exceeding 1,500 kilometers. “Ukrainian ‘Flamingos’ traveled more than 1,500 kilometers,” Zelenskyy stated, describing the strikes as part of Ukraine’s continued long-range response to Russian attacks.

Zelenskyy said the targeted facility in Cheboksary produces relay protection systems, automation equipment, and low-voltage components, and supplies navigation elements for the Russian Navy, missile production sector, aviation, and armored vehicles. “All of this is what Russians use in the war against Ukraine,” he noted.

Viewed Foreign Fighter Recruitment to Be Centralised in New Ukrainian Hub 🇺🇦

Ukraine is working to establish a unified coordination center designed to manage the recruitment of foreign nationals for military service.

According to the Office of the President of Ukraine on May 5, this specialized hub will oversee the process of bringing international volunteers into the Armed Forces of Ukraine and the National Guard.

Kyrylo Budanov, the Head of the Office of the President of Ukraine, stated, "Ukraine needs to create a single coordination center for recruiting foreigners for military service. This should be a structural unit that should cover all stages: from search, selection, and transportation to training, supply, and other needs of foreign citizens."

The creation of this hub was the focus of a meeting between the Office of the President, members of parliament, and representatives of the defense forces.

The participants agreed to spend the month of May developing the unit within the Ministry of Defense. They also plan to present a recruitment program for foreign citizens and stateless persons while preparing legal updates to resolve current regulatory challenges.

According to Deputy Head of the President's Office Pavlo Palisa, certain military units may take direct responsibility for training and supplying these recruits.

Viewed It's almost here...✨🌷 My first ever stationery & scrapbook collection launches TOMORROW May 5th at 1PM CST!

I am incredibly excited, nervous, hopeful... and so many other feelings about the release of these handmade paper products. I have been working on this collection since November, and it's hard to believe that the day is finally here.

This collection features various products like scrapbook papers (12x12 and 6x6), ephemera packs, stickers, greeting cards, art prints, notepads, and bookmarks. Each piece was designed with my hand-illustrations using various mediums such as acrylics, gouache, watercolor pastels and pencils, brush pens, and digital art. 

I am looking forward to sharing it with you tomorrow! Head to underatinroof.com if you'd like to take a look. 

I appreciate you all so much and thank you to those of you who have been so kind and supportive while I venture down this new and exciting path! 🥰 You are always so wonderfully kind to me, and I deeply appreciate it.
xoxo Kayla

Viewed “Drone-Like Vehicles to Hunt Potholes? Nitin Gadkari Says Indians May ‘Curse Him Less’ This Monsoon”

Union Minister Nitin Gadkari has said a drone-like vehicle has been developed to detect and inspect potholes across Indian roads, as the government pushes for stricter monitoring of road quality and maintenance. Gadkari said he has personally reviewed conditions in states like Tamil Nadu and Gujarat and warned officials that accountability will now be tighter. He also remarked that this monsoon, people may have to “curse him less” over potholes.

The government is also encouraging citizens to report road issues through social media to speed up repairs and improve response systems. The move is being seen as part of a broader push toward technology-driven infrastructure monitoring and safer road conditions across the country.

Viewed India accords a warm welcome to General Secretary, President Mr. To Lam of Vietnam. The fact that he has visited India within a month of becoming President and that he has come along with a high-level delegation clearly reflects the priority he attaches to India-Vietnam relations. Making it even more special is the fact that he began his India visit from Bodh Gaya, reflecting the shared civilisational and spiritual traditions of our two countries.

During our talks today, we discussed how to advance developmental cooperation in areas such as trade, technology and tourism. We have taken key decisions that will increase trade to $25 billion by 2030. We also discussed how to work together in agricultural, fisheries, critical minerals, rare earths and energy cooperation. Priority will also be given towards enhancing cultural linkages.

Viewed Spirit Airlines is out of the game, so which airline will inherit the ignominious title of most-hated airline in America? 

Among large carriers, the title passes to American Eagle, a network of regional flights operated by American Airlines, according to YouGov. If you’re looking at all US airlines, then Allegiant — a low-cost carrier that mostly services vacation destinations — was already less popular than Spirit was.

Don’t underestimate the airline industry’s ability to give you new reasons to hate it, though. Some analysts predict that Spirit’s closure will push other airlines’ fares up: CBS found average fares rose roughly $60, or 23%, when Spirit exited a route.

That’s on top of rising fuel costs from the war in Iran, which could lead airlines to cut flights, raise fares, and impose further fees. And you’ll still pay for your carry-on.

📸: Giorgio Vera/AFP via Getty Images

Viewed Why do Indians tolerate bad roads, polluted air, broken systems?

In a recent episode, Shekhar Dutt, co-founder of Sleepy Classes IAS, explained this.

When a country's per capita income crosses around $8000, citizens start demanding better. 

Roads get fixed, air gets cleaner, and systems start working. 

Because people have the bandwidth to fight for it and governments have the resources to deliver.

India is at $2600. At that level, survival is still the priority for most people. 

You're not thinking about air quality when you're thinking about next month's rent. You're not demanding accountability when you're figuring out how to get your kid into a decent school. 

The system stays broken because fighting it feels like a luxury most people can't afford.

So the belief in building this country, in making things better, sits with the majority of people who have the fewest resources.

India will cross $8000 eventually. The economy is moving in that direction. 

But the standards we build now, what we accept, what we tolerate, what we fight for, will shape what kind of country we become when we finally have the resources to fix things.

The money will come. The question is whether the mindset will come with it.

Full conversation is out now, watch here: https://www.figuringout.co/link/fo-505

Viewed The Atlantic Meridional Overturning Circulation (AMOC) — the Atlantic’s "giant conveyor belt" — is weakening. While it may seem far away, its slowdown has a direct "teleconnection" to the Indian Monsoon.

A disrupted AMOC can shift tropical rainfall belts, potentially leading to unpredictable monsoon patterns, prolonged droughts, or extreme weather events across the subcontinent. Understanding this climate "tipping point" is no longer optional; it’s essential for our future food and water security.

Viewed Ukraine 🇺🇦 Upgrades One of Its Most Iconic Drones to Detect Russian Interceptors in Mid-Air

Ukraine’s widely used reconnaissance drone, Raybird, has received a new upgrade allowing it to detect Russian interceptor drones in flight, a development aimed at improving survivability in increasingly contested airspace, according to a Ukrainian manufacturer Skyeton, in a comment to Militarnyi on May 5.

The new capability enables operators to quickly identify threats and perform evasive maneuvers during missions. The solution has already entered serial production and is being integrated into operational drone systems.

The upgrade comes as interceptor drones become more common on the battlefield, forcing manufacturers to introduce active countermeasures to protect unmanned aircraft.

By adding a detection module, the Raybird is expected to significantly increase the chances of completing missions while preserving the drone itself, particularly during long-range reconnaissance flights deep behind enemy lines.

“We approach every upgrade with great care. Our goal is to make Raybird even more survivable in the most challenging conditions. We thoroughly studied available solutions and technologies in the field and conducted extensive testing. Based on this, we selected the most effective option for our UAV,” said Roman Knyazhenko.

Viewed “I Will Not Resign”: Mamata Banerjee Rejects Calls to Step Down.

West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee has refused to resign after her party’s defeat, stating firmly, “I will not resign, morally, we have won.” Despite the BJP’s sweeping victory, she rejected the outcome as a true reflection of public mandate and signaled that she will continue her political fight.

Banerjee’s remarks have intensified the political standoff in West Bengal, with her alleging irregularities and bias in the election process while offering no concrete evidence. As the BJP prepares to form the government after a historic win, her refusal to step down sets the stage for a constitutional and political confrontation in the state.

If it resonates, read further.

In any setup, there will be a few skilled people who always try to play safe and don't make decisions. They are just afraid of being wrong and make decisions only when they are 100% sure. What they don't understand is by not making enough right decisions they don't progress and stagnate in career.

I'm not saying you should make hasty decisions - it will lead to blunders. 

But you should be comfortable with the idea that in an year you will make about 20 decisions out of which 5 will be wrong, 5 will be ineffective but the remaining 10 effective decisions is what defines your progress. One of those 10 effective decisions will become a big leap in your career.

Also by making more decisions, you get fine tuned and the % of wrong / ineffective decisions reduce over time.

What is the biggest headline of Elections 2026?

Viewed Bengal saw a 93 percent voter turnout and nobody was talking. Journalists went to the ground. People were silent. Scared. And then the results came and everything changed overnight.

Today's video covers five state elections that collectively shut a lot of people up. BJP crosses 200 in Bengal. Mamata loses her own seat. TMC nearly wiped out. Hemanta returns for a third time in Assam. In Tamil Nadu, an actor walks in and dismantles both major parties. And in Kerala, for the first time since 1977, there is not a single communist government anywhere in this country. On Karl Marx's birthday. Today.

But this video is not just about results. It is about the patterns nobody wants to name. What these five states revealed is not just an electoral verdict. It is an accountability receipt. For arrogance. For normalized corruption. For leaders so disconnected from the ground that they genuinely did not see it coming. When you stop listening to voters and start lecturing them, this is what happens. Democracy does not forgive that. Not in Bengal, not in Tamil Nadu, not anywhere.

Video goes live at 06:30 PM today. Do not miss it.

Viewed We grew up thinking friendships just happen naturally.

School friends.
College groups.
Office colleagues.
People always around us.

But adulthood changes that.

Suddenly everyone is “busy.”
You talk less.
Meet less.
Reply later.
And somehow months pass while still feeling “updated” through Instagram stories and WhatsApp statuses.

The strange part?

We are probably the most connected generation in history yet loneliness has quietly become normal.

And what’s even more interesting is:
an entire economy is growing because of it.

Therapy apps.
AI companions.
Solo dining.
Wellness subscriptions.
Communities designed to replace what friendships once gave us for free.

Maybe the real cost of modern life isn’t just stress.

Maybe it’s that we slowly stopped making time for people who made life feel lighter.

What's your thought:
Have adult friendships genuinely become harder to maintain or are we just prioritising other things over them?

There’s one part about how loneliness is reshaping the economy that completely changes the way you look at modern life.

Read the full article here - https://open.substack.com/pub/rajshamani/p/adults-are-losing-friends-and-its-ce8?r=87sw63&utm_campaign=post-expanded-share&utm_medium=web

Viewed অভূতপূর্ব পালাবদল। বাংলার মানুষের রায় আরও একবার পরিবর্তনের পটভূমি রচনা করলো। অভিনন্দন জানাই বিজয়ী বিজেপি প্রার্থীদের। 
আশা রাখব এবার শিক্ষা, সংস্কৃতি, শিল্প সব দিকে বাংলা আবার শিখরে এগিয়ে যাবার পথ পাবে নতুন সরকারের নেতৃত্বে। বাংলার যে সংস্কৃতি তা আবার ফিরে আসবে আমাদের সমাজে।
আমরা সাধারণ মানুষ, দিন শেষে সম্মান আর শান্তি নিয়ে থাকতে চাই, আমাদের সন্তানদের সঠিক ভাবেই শিক্ষিত করে গড়ে তুলতে চাই, আর অবশ্যই প্রতিটি মানুষের রোজগারের পথ যাতে সুগম ও প্রশস্থ হয় সেই আশা রাখি।
আরও আশা রাখব অন্য রাজ্যে বা বিদেশে গিয়ে বাংলার সরকারের কাণ্ডকারখানা নিয়ে হাস্যস্পদ হতে হবে না, বরং গর্ব করে বলতে পারব আমরা পশ্চিমবঙ্গের বাসিন্দা।
গত দুই দশক ধরে পশ্চিমবঙ্গের রাজনীতিতে ভাষার যে কদর্য ব্যবহার আমরা দেখেছি, প্রথম সারির নেতা নেত্রী দের বক্তব্যে যে অশিক্ষা এবং বোধের অভাব লক্ষ্য করেছি, সীমাহীন অশালীনতা, শিল্প, সাহিত্য, সাংস্কৃতিক জগতে ন্যাক্কারজনক স্বজন পোষণ ও তোষণ, যা কোনও কালেও বাংলার সংস্কৃতি ছিল না, এই সব বন্ধ হবে। আমাদের সোনার দিন নতুন সরকারের সদর্থক ভূমিকায় ফিরে আসবে।
শ্রী বিধান রায় মহাশয়ের পরেই বাংলার শনির দশা শুরু হয়েছিল, যা ৪ঠা মে ২০২৬ অব্দি অব্যাহত, এবার রাজনৈতিক পালা বদল সত্যিই বাংলার পালাবদলের সূচনা কি না, তাই জানবার ও উপলব্ধি করবার জন্য মুখিয়ে রইলাম, সময়ই সেই উত্তর দেবে।
বিজয়ী প্রার্থীদের ExS এর পক্ষ থেকে আন্তরিক অভিনন্দন। সেই সঙ্গে করজোড়ে একান্ত আবেদন, কোনো প্ররোচনায় পা দেবেন না, উত্তেজিত হয়ে কোনো হঠকারী কাজ করবেন না, সমাজ মাধ্যমে হিংসা ছড়ায় এরকম কোনো পোস্ট করবেন না। আমরা সকলেই পশ্চিমবঙ্গের বাসিন্দা, সকলেই একে অপরের সঙ্গে হাতে হাত মিলিয়ে এই রাজ্য কে এগিয়ে নিয়ে যাব। হিংসা, ক্ষয় ক্ষতি, প্রাণহানি একেবারেই কাম্য নয়, এই সব এই জয়কেই কলুষিত করবে। 
আর সবশেষে এটা বলি যে, গণতন্ত্রে একদল জিতবে একদল হারবে এটাই নিয়ম, কিন্তু যারা জিতলেন তাদের কিন্তু এটা দায়িত্ব যারা হারলেন তাদেরকেও সমান দৃষ্টিতে দেখা এবং আগলে রাখা এবং কোনরকম বিদ্বেষ মূলক আচরণ তাদের উপর না করা, তবেই আমরা সোনার বাংলা গড়ার লক্ষ্যে পৌঁছাতে পারবো,শেষ করি কবিগুরুর এই লাইন গুলো দিয়ে,
"বাংলার মাটি, বাংলার জল 
বাংলার বায়ু,বাংলার ফল
পুণ্য হউক,পুণ্য হউক হে ভগবান"
ভালো থাকবেন সকলে, অনেক অনেক শুভেচ্ছা।

Viewed Ukraine 🇺🇦 Shoots Down Russia’s New Geran-4 Jet Drone in First Documented Intercept

Ukraine’s air defense units have intercepted Russia’s newest jet-powered strike drone, the Geran-4, marking the first confirmed use of this type in combat.

According to reports on May 3, the drone was destroyed by soldiers of Ukraine’s 1020th Anti-Aircraft Missile Regiment using a Sting interceptor drone. Footage of the interception was published by the Ukrainian company “Wild Hornets,” which develops interceptor systems.

The operation was conducted using the Hornet Vision CTRL system, allowing operators to guide the interceptor remotely from a secure location.

Additional details were reported by Ukrainian defense observers and officials, including communications and electronic warfare expert Serhii “Flash” Beskrestnov, who noted that the interception was carried out remotely, highlighting the system’s ability to engage targets from tens or even hundreds of kilometers away.

The Geran-4 is a jet-powered evolution of earlier Geran-series drones, designed for higher speed and improved performance. Open-source data indicates the drone has a wingspan of around three meters and a length of approximately 3.5 meters, with its takeoff weight increased to about 450 kilograms.

It is equipped with a turbojet engine producing roughly 160 kg of thrust—significantly more powerful than the engine used in the previous Geran-3 model.
